chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-831 0f 2015 Date Oe٢ t s9ق٥t٥٤ ٧٤ J٧٥٩٤ For haaring ol maln casa 1210.2022 Mr Nisar A٠ Bhanbharo Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich AAG along with Ali Ahmed Rajper DEO (EH&SH) Khairpur NKIHRRRRو Petitioner applied for post of Junior School Teacher under Recruitment Policy 2O12 against vacancies announced ٧C Setharja and was declared successful in test having obtained 64 marks However at the same time another candidate namely Mst Pervaizan also secured similar ie 64. But since she was older than her in age, she was given preference appointed Petitioner filed this petition in 2OT5, after much span of time Mst Pervaizan has been rendered service for the last 10 years and meanwhile much water has passed from under the bridges At this point in time, petitioner s only emphasis articulated by her Counsel is that if it is possible she may be considered and adjusted as in tne said UC, there were 13 seats lying vacant and only 09 seats were filled However this is disputed by learned AAG he has confirmed only 09 seats, which were filled in the year 2012 and that there were seat is lying to accommodate the petitioner on preset no that thls petition after ten vears We therefore feel InfrUctUOUs Since no seat is lying recruitment has virtually become the petitioner on, we cannot pass any such vacant to accommodate 0rdef. This; accordingly disposed of marks and vacant petition
